channel.title: Speed Gifts
channel.description: Premium Personalized Gifts in Abu Dhabi

item.g:title: Personalized Engraved Bamboo Bottle
item.g:description: Capture cherished moments on this eco-friendly bamboo bottle. With a natural bamboo exterior, insulated core, leak-proof lid, and carry loop, it’s built for everyday use. We’ll custom-engrave your photo and text to create a lasting, one-of-a-kind keepsake — perfect for couples, anniversaries, or any special occasion.

item.g:title: Personalized Award
item.g:description:
Celebrate achievements with our premium personalized awards, designed to honor excellence, success, and milestones. Perfect for corporate events, employee recognition, school & college awards, business achievements, and special occasions.
Each award can be customized with names, titles, logos, messages, and year, making every piece truly meaningful and unique.
Customization Options: • Sandblast Printing • Precision Engraving (Final finish depends on selected design and artwork)
Crafted with a clean and elegant look, these awards suit all shapes and styles, making them a timeless choice for any recognition purpose.
Ideal For: • Corporate Awards • Employee Appreciation • Academic Achievements • Business & Brand Recognition • Event & Ceremony Awards
Why Choose This Award: • Fully Personalized • Premium Finish • Suitable for All Award Shapes • Professional & Elegant Look • Long-Lasting Quality

item.g:title: Personalized Number Plate Keychain
item.g:description:
Add a personal touch to your keys with our premium collection of customized keychains! We offer a wide variety of stylish models designed to suit your personality.
Whether you are looking for a simple, elegant design or something unique to gift a loved one, we have the perfect options for you. Each keychain is made with high-quality materials to ensure durability and style.
✨ Key Features:
✅ Custom Made: Designed and personalized according to your preference.
✅ Premium Quality: Durable build with a high-quality finish.
✅ Wide Collection: Available in various unique shapes and styles.
✅ Perfect for Gifting: A thoughtful gift for any occasion.
🛒 How to Order:
Select your preferred keychain model from our catalogue.
Send us your customization details via WhatsApp.
We will make it ready for you!

item.g:title: Personalized Caricature
item.g:description:
Add a touch of personality to your space with our custom 2D Caricature Standees. We turn your favorite photos into unique digital art, expertly crafted on a durable acrylic base. It’s a modern, creative, and thoughtful gift that stands out on any desk or shelf.
Features Material: Premium Acrylic for a sleek and professional look.
Printing: High-quality sticker printing with vibrant, sharp details.
Design: Custom 2D digital illustration based on your provided photo.
Finish: Precision-cut silhouette with a matching stable base.
Usage: Perfect for home decor, office desks, or as a personalized gift.

item.g:title: Premium Personalized Bamboo Pen with Engraved Case
item.g:description:
Elevate your gifting with this elegant Personalized Bamboo Pen with Matching Engraved Case. Crafted from eco-friendly bamboo and paired with sleek metallic accents, this pen set blends natural beauty with a modern finish.
Both the pen and the cylindrical case can be engraved with any name, message, or occasion, making it a thoughtful and meaningful gift for promotions, achievements, corporate events, teachers, colleagues, and loved ones.

item.g:title: Personalized Acrylic Car Hanger | Custom Engraved Car Mirror Hanging
item.g:description:
Best Dad Ever Personalized Acrylic Car Hanger
Celebrate the special bond between a father and his loved ones with our Personalized Acrylic Car Hanger. Expertly crafted from premium-quality acrylic, this unique car accessory can be customized with names, making it a meaningful and memorable gift for Father's Day, birthdays, anniversaries, or any special occasion.
Featuring a beautiful family-inspired design with personalized engraving, this custom car hanger adds a personal touch to any vehicle while serving as a daily reminder of love and family. Lightweight, durable, and elegantly finished, it is designed to hang perfectly from your car's rearview mirror.

item.g:title: Bamboo Photo Frame
item.g:description:
Print on Bamboo Frame – Where Modern Meets Natural ✨
Give your memories a sleek, artistic edge with our photo printed on aluminum sheet, beautifully mounted on a rich bamboo wood frame. The vibrant metal print adds a sharp, glossy finish, while the natural bamboo adds warmth and elegance.
📸 Ultra-clear photo print on aluminum 🌳 Eco-friendly bamboo wooden base 🖼️ Modern, stylish, and long-lasting 🎁 Ideal for premium gifting & luxury décor 💖 A bold and beautiful way to showcase your best moments
A perfect blend of metallic shine and wooden charm – made to impress!

item.g:title: Modern Black Mug with Wooden Handle & Lid
item.g:description:
Experience a sleek, modern design with this sophisticated ceramic mug. It features a stunning matte black finish, a comfortable solid-wood handle, and a matching bamboo lid to keep your beverages at the perfect temperature.
This mug is ideal for custom personalization. We can expertly engrave your logo, name, or unique design onto the bamboo lid for a premium, natural look, or print your design on the mug itself. It’s a stylish choice for corporate branding or a chic personal gift.

item.g:title: Personalized Rock Photo Print
item.g:description:
Turn your favorite memories into a timeless display with our Sublimation Printed Rock Frame. Made from natural stone with beautifully rough edges, this unique photo rock adds a premium and elegant touch to any space.
Using high-quality sublimation printing, we can print any photo, design, text, or quote directly onto the rock surface with vibrant colors and long-lasting clarity. From family photos and couple moments to baby pictures, friends, or custom messages — your memories come alive on stone.
Perfect for:
Home & office décor
Birthday, anniversary & wedding gifts
Baby keepsakes & family photos
Friendship & couple gifts
Each rock frame comes with a stand, making it easy to display on tables, shelves, or desks. Every piece is unique due to its natural stone shape, making your gift truly one of a kind.
We can print any text with photo — fully customizable to your choice.

item.g:title: Personalized White Mug
item.g:description:
Personalized Photo Printed Mug ☕ Turn your memories into a beautiful mug! Add your favorite photo, quote, or design to create a unique gift for birthdays, anniversaries, or just because.
✅ Premium ceramic material ✅ Sharp & vibrant photo print ✅ Microwave & dishwasher safe ✅ Perfect for gifting or personal use
📸 Just send your photo – we’ll handle the rest! 🎁 Bulk orders & custom designs available

item.g:title: Personalized Acrylic LED Photo Lamp
item.g:description:
Transform your cherished memories into a stunning illuminated keepsake with our Personalised Acrylic LED Photo Lamp. Crafted from premium clear acrylic and mounted on an elegant wooden LED base, this custom lamp beautifully showcases your favourite photos and personalised text, creating a unique décor piece for any home or office.
Whether it's a wedding, anniversary, birthday, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, or a special gift for loved ones, this custom LED lamp adds a warm and meaningful touch to every occasion.
Product Features
✅ Premium-quality clear acrylic panel ✅ Elegant wooden LED light base ✅ Personalized with your photos and custom text ✅ Bright, energy-efficient warm LED illumination

item.g:description:
Add a warm and personal touch to your space with this beautiful Personalized Acrylic Engraved LED Lamp. This unique lamp features your favorite photo and text precisely engraved on a clear acrylic plate, creating a stunning glowing effect when the LED light is turned on.
The engraved acrylic design sits on a durable plastic LED base, providing stable support and soft illumination that enhances the details of the engraving. It is a perfect decorative piece for bedrooms, living rooms, offices, or as a heartfelt gift for your loved ones.
Customize it with your favorite photo, name, quote, or special date to create a memorable keepsake that lasts forever.

item.g:title: Personalized Acrylic Wall Clock
item.g:description:
Turn your favorite memories into a timeless keepsake with our Personalized Acrylic Photo Clock. Crafted from premium-quality glossy black acrylic, this elegant clock combines modern design with personalized photo printing to create a unique decorative piece for your home or office.
Featuring a sleek circular design with a high-definition printed photo, this custom clock makes a meaningful gift for couples, families, anniversaries, weddings, birthdays, housewarmings, Mother's Day, Father's Day, and other special occasions. item.g:description:
Symbolize your everlasting love with this unique infinity-shaped wooden photo plaque. Crafted from smooth, natural light wood, this striking piece features your cherished photograph beautifully laser-engraved onto its base, creating a truly personal and enduring tribute.
The elegant infinity symbol arches above, gracefully carrying the touching message: "Life became more beautiful since that day you entered in my life." Below your photo, your names are prominently displayed, entwined with a delicate heart, further personalizing this special keepsake. Subtle floral engravings add a touch of natural charm to the design. Designed to stand freely, it's a perfect centerpiece for any romantic setting.

item.g:description:

A Timeless Anniversary Keepsake: This personalized wooden plaque is the ultimate gift for anniversaries, engagements, weddings, or as a heartfelt declaration of love. Designed to stand proudly on any desk, shelf, or mantel, it's a keepsake that will be cherished for a lifetime.

item.g:title: Personalized Metal Photo Print Frame – Premium Aluminum Sublimation Wall Photo Frame | Custom Metal Print UAE
item.g:description:
Personalized Metal Photo Print Frame
Transform your favorite memories into a stunning Personalized Metal Photo Print Frame crafted using premium-quality aluminum and advanced sublimation printing technology. Unlike traditional paper photo frames, your image is printed directly onto a specially coated metal sheet, delivering exceptional color accuracy, incredible sharpness, and a beautiful metallic shine that enhances every detail.
The photo is mounted on a durable acrylic backing with a hidden hanging hook, creating a modern floating wall display that looks elegant in any home or office. The metallic finish gives your photos a vibrant, glossy appearance while maintaining long-lasting durability, making it an excellent choice for preserving life's most precious moments.
Whether you're decorating your living room or looking for a thoughtful personalized gift, our custom metal photo print offers a premium finish that stands out from ordinary photo frames.
We offer fast delivery across the UAE, including Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, Umm Al Quwain, and Al Ain.
Product Features
Premium quality aluminum metal photo print
High-definition sublimation printing
Brilliant colors with a luxurious metallic finish
Scratch-resistant and fade-resistant surface
Waterproof and easy to clean
Modern frameless floating wall design
Strong acrylic backing with hidden hanging hook
Lightweight yet durable construction
Personalized with your own photo
Available in multiple sizes
Ready to hang
Fast delivery across the UAE

item.g:title: Personalized Magnetic Hourglass
item.g:description:
Redefine the way you experience time with our Magnetic Hourglass. This modern 2-minute timer uses fine iron particles instead of sand, creating a striking magnetic spike formation as the particles are drawn toward the hidden magnet below. Every turn delivers a mesmerizing visual effect, making it both functional and decorative.
Designed with a clear glass body and a premium wooden base, this piece adds a sophisticated touch to desks, workspaces, and home interiors.
The wooden base can be personalized with custom engraving, allowing you to add names, dates, initials, or a short meaningful message. This makes it a thoughtful and unique gift choice for couples, anniversaries, birthdays, weddings, or special occasions.
Product Features:
2-minute magnetic timer
Unique iron particle magnetic effect
High-quality glass construction
Premium wooden base
Custom engraving available on the base
Ideal for gifting and modern décor
A timeless design made personal with your engraving.

item.g:title: Personalized Rock Photo Print
item.g:description:
Turn your favorite memories into a timeless display with our Sublimation Printed Rock Frame. Made from natural stone with beautifully rough edges, this unique photo rock adds a premium and elegant touch to any space.
Using high-quality sublimation printing, we can print any photo, design, text, or quote directly onto the rock surface with vibrant colors and long-lasting clarity. From family photos and couple moments to baby pictures, friends, or custom messages — your memories come alive on stone.
Perfect for:
Home & office décor
Birthday, anniversary & wedding gifts
Baby keepsakes & family photos
Friendship & couple gifts
Each rock frame comes with a stand, making it easy to display on tables, shelves, or desks. Every piece is unique due to its natural stone shape, making your gift truly one of a kind.
We can print any text with photo — fully customizable to your choice.
